properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We may be troubled, There will be trials, But we are not alone. We may be burdened but we're not broken, We're holding to this hope that this will not last forever.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are God over everything, In the joy & the suffering, There is a reason for every teardrop that we cry, Ever moment in our lives shaping our story. Let it be glory!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: In every weakness, Through every season, You meet us with Your grace. Our hearts are strengthened, We will be faithful to ever sing Your praise. Cause this will not last forever.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Only to You, Let it be blessing, Let it be honor, Only to You, Because You're worthy, Let it be glory!

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Because You're worthy, Let it be glory! Let it be glory!
